# `api.jobs.get_price`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/price` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.get_price(job_display_id: int) -> JobPrice
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs get_price <job_display_id>
```

GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/price (ACPortal)

## Response

Returns `JobPrice`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `jobDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no |  |
| `prices` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Price breakdowns |
| `total` | `Optional[float]` | no | Total price |
| `totalSellPrice` | `Optional[float]` | no | Total sell price |
